title: Truth or Dare?
original_title: Truth or Dare? - A Critical Madness
overview: Mike Strauber catches his wife Sharon in bed with his best friend Jerry. He gets mad and takes off to embark on an adventure of murder and self-mutilation in demented games of truth or dare.
